scripts.build: pnpm run build:kimicoding && pnpm run build:kie && pnpm run build:xai && pnpm run build:openai && pnpm run build:fal && pnpm run build:fireworks && pnpm run build:anthropic && pnpm run build:alibaba && pnpm run build:free
scripts.build:openai: pnpm --filter @apicity/openai run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs openai
scripts.build:kimicoding: pnpm --filter @apicity/kimicoding run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs kimicoding
scripts.build:kie: pnpm --filter @apicity/kie run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs kie
scripts.build:xai: pnpm --filter @apicity/xai run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs xai
scripts.build:fal: pnpm --filter @apicity/fal run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs fal
scripts.build:fireworks: pnpm --filter @apicity/fireworks run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs fireworks
scripts.build:anthropic: pnpm --filter @apicity/anthropic run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs anthropic
scripts.build:alibaba: pnpm --filter @apicity/alibaba run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs alibaba
scripts.build:free: pnpm --filter @apicity/free run build && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs free
scripts.doc-gen:all: node scripts/doc-gen.mjs fal && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs openai && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs xai && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs kimicoding && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs kie && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs fireworks && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs anthropic && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs alibaba && node scripts/doc-gen.mjs free
scripts.test:integration:record-missing: op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- env POLLY_MODE=record-missing pnpm vitest run --config tests/vitest.integration.ts
scripts.harness:screenshot: mkdir -p tests/fixtures/harness-generated && npx tsx tests/harness-serve.ts --html tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report.html tests/recordings/ && npx tsx tests/harness-screenshot.ts tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report.html tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report.png
scripts.harness:screenshot:media: mkdir -p tests/fixtures/harness-generated && npx tsx tests/harness-serve.ts --html tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report-media.html --media-only tests/recordings/ && npx tsx tests/harness-screenshot.ts tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report-media.html tests/fixtures/harness-generated/harness-report-media.png
scripts.dev:preflight: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:run
scripts.ci:local: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:run
scripts.check:op: op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- node -e 'console.log("1Password OK — %d secrets resolved", Object.keys(process.env).filter(k => ["OPENAI_API_KEY","KIE_API_KEY","XAI_API_KEY","KIMI_CODING_API_KEY","FAL_API_KEY","FIREWORKS_API_KEY","ANTHROPIC_API_KEY","DASHSCOPE_API_KEY"].includes(k) && process.env[k] && !process.env[k].startsWith("op://")).length)'
